headline: Oil rises, with Brent climbing back above $100 as optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
summary: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.

raw.headline: Oil rises, with Brent climbing back above $100 as optimism fades over Iran war de-escalation
raw.summary: Oil prices traded higher on Tuesday, with international benchmark Brent crude climbing back above $100 per barrel.

headline: Asia-Pacific markets pare gains as oil rebounds on Iran war-linked uncertainty
summary: Asia-Pacific markets rose but pared earlier gains as oil prices rebounded, underscoring lingering uncertainty over the trajectory of the Middle East conflict.

raw.headline: Asia-Pacific markets pare gains as oil rebounds on Iran war-linked uncertainty
raw.summary: Asia-Pacific markets rose but pared earlier gains as oil prices rebounded, underscoring lingering uncertainty over the trajectory of the Middle East conflict.

headline: Trump administration plans to bring more diesel to market as fuel prices surge, Wright says
summary: Diesel prices have surged about 40% to $5.29 per gallon, the highest level since 2022, as the U.S. war against Iran has disrupted oil supplies.

raw.headline: Trump administration plans to bring more diesel to market as fuel prices surge, Wright says
raw.summary: Diesel prices have surged about 40% to $5.29 per gallon, the highest level since 2022, as the U.S. war against Iran has disrupted oil supplies.

headline: Phillips 66 to announce first-quarter financial results
summary: HOUSTON, March 23, 2026--Phillips 66 executive management will host a webcast at noon ET on April 29, 2026, to discuss the company's first-quarter 2026 financial results.

raw.headline: Phillips 66 to announce first-quarter financial results
raw.summary: HOUSTON, March 23, 2026--Phillips 66 executive management will host a webcast at noon ET on April 29, 2026, to discuss the company's first-quarter 2026 financial results.

headline: Watch Energy Secretary Wright discuss Iran war after Trump postpones power plant strikes
summary: Wright's comments Monday come after Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants if the Islamic Republic's leaders do not fully open the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: Watch Energy Secretary Wright discuss Iran war after Trump postpones power plant strikes
raw.summary: Wright's comments Monday come after Trump threatened to bomb Iran's power plants if the Islamic Republic's leaders do not fully open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: CVR (CVI) Soars 5.3%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: CVR (CVI) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: Trump tells CNBC 'we are very intent on making a deal' with Iran
summary: U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday said he would order the military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days.

raw.headline: Trump tells CNBC 'we are very intent on making a deal' with Iran
raw.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday said he would order the military to postpone strikes on Iran's power plants and energy infrastructure for five days.

headline: Oil tumbles after Trump puts hold on U.S. strikes against Iran energy infrastructure for five days
summary: President Donald Trump said Monday that the U.S. and Iran had productive talks over the weekend about ending the war.

raw.headline: Oil tumbles after Trump puts hold on U.S. strikes against Iran energy infrastructure for five days
